commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5559962f78f5a63d5d5531634cc72cc23ad6cde5)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes subagent registry restore and orphan recovery so stale unended aborted subagent runs are pruned or skipped after restart, with docs and a persistence test updated.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests -9, Docs 0. Total -1 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main's helper exempts `abortedLastRun` sessions from stale restore pruning, and the existing persistence test asserts a 3-hour stale aborted run is waited on and kept. I did not execute the tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the stale session-state cutoff, plus a code fix for the stale skipped-run lifecycle path.

target.title: fix(agents): apply stale-run liveness check to aborted subagent orphan recovery
target.body:
## Summary

修复 #90766: orphan recovery 在网关重启后恢复过于陈旧的 subagent session。

两处修改：
1. **`subagent-registry-helpers.ts`**: 移除 `resolveSubagentRunOrphanReason` 中对 `abortedLastRun: true` session 的 stale-unended 豁免——现在所有过期 run 在 registry restore 时都会被清理
2. **`subagent-orphan-recovery.ts`**: 在 `recoverOrphanedSubagentSessions` 中新增 `isStaleUnendedSubagentRun` 检查，跳过超过 stale-run 窗口(默认2小时)的 aborted session

## Test plan

- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-registry.persistence.test.ts` — 18/18 通过
- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-orphan-recovery.test.ts` — 19/19 通过

## Verification

之前的行为：stale(3小时) + `abortedLastRun: true` 的 subagent 会被恢复

现在的行为：stale run 无论 `abortedLastRun` 状态如何都会被 prune

Fixes: #90766

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: huangting-xy
